narrative:
Yellow Springs Ex Vill Sd (Greene) exempted village school district has 3,800 registered voters, with 40.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 6.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 52.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 45.4 percentage points.
